description_long: This is a modern, single-family house with a clean, minimalist design and a light-colored exterior. The house features a gable roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck that wraps around the back and side, providing ample outdoor living space. A rectangular swimming pool and sun loungers are situated in the backyard, complemented by a patio area with outdoor furniture and several trees for landscaping. The property includes a driveway leading to a single-car garage with a dark roof, and a low hedge marks the front boundary. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large picture windows facing the pool and deck area. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang.
description: A modern, light-colored house with a gable roof, large windows, a wooden deck, swimming pool, and attached garage, surrounded by landscaped trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, pool, deck, and landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the extensive wooden deck area behind the house.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the wooden deck, large windows, pool, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pool, sun loungers, deck, and the rear landscaping with trees and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, flush with the facade and minimal decorative elements
